<!--
Template: decision record (ADR-style).
Copy into docs/decisions/, name it NNNN-short-title.md (e.g. 0001-use-postgres.md).
Delete these comments before committing.
-->

# NNNN — <Decision title>

- **Status:** proposed | accepted | rejected | superseded
- **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Deciders:** <names or roles>
- **Related question:** <link to docs/ledger/...> (optional)
- **Supersedes / superseded by:** <link> (optional)

## Context

What is the problem or force that requires a decision? What constraints apply?

## Decision

The decision, stated plainly in one or two sentences.

## Consequences

- Positive: ...
- Negative / trade-offs: ...
- Follow-ups: ...

## Alternatives considered

- **<Option A>** — why not chosen.
- **<Option B>** — why not chosen.
